work_unit: MM-M006: persist error_message on partial-fill match failure in engine.rs L423-433
situation: audit-cycle-state status=fix-in-progress, pending_count=13. Highest priority pending finding MM-M006 (priority 9): attempt_match Err branch only saves order when filled_quantity==0. When partial fills occur before a match error, the order record goes stale — no error_message, no updated_at refresh, no save_order call. Downstream reconciliation/cancel sees outdated state.
action: Add else branch at L423-433: when filled_quantity > 0 and attempt_match returns Err, persist error_message ('部分成交后撮合异常') + updated_at via save_order without releasing resources (real trades already booked). Status stays PARTIALLY_FILLED so downstream can still cancel/reconcile. Added tracing::warn for observability.
outcome_evidence: cargo check -p moni-engine passed. Commit 4a94475 pushed to origin/auto/opt-moni-engine-1782949388. Diff: +14 lines in Err(e) branch adding else clause with tracing::warn + error_message + updated_at + save_order.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: MM-M007 (priority 10) — engine.rs L286 unused _notifications clone keeps extra broadcast sender ref preventing channel close. Same worktree opt-moni-engine-1782949388 can be reused (same area).
